name: BatchDeleteTableRequest
description: BatchDeleteTableRequest schema from Amazon Glue API

allOf.description: The ID of the Data Catalog where the table resides. If none is provided, the Amazon Web Services account ID is used by default.
The name of the catalog database in which the tables to delete reside. For Hive compatibility, this name is entirely lowercase.
A list of the table to delete.
The transaction ID at which to delete the table contents.
